🔨 Moderation
🛠️ Utility
🎉 Fun
?kick @userKick a member from the server
?ban @userPermanently ban a member
?unban IDUnban a user by ID
?mute @user 10mTimeout a member (30s, 10m, 2h, 1d)
?unmute @userRemove a member's timeout
?purge 50Delete last N messages
?purge @userDelete messages from a user
?warn @userIssue a formal warning
?warnings @userView a member's warnings
?clearwarns @userClear all warnings
?sharemod @userPost a shared moderation card
?modtrack @userView mod statistics
?setwelcomeSet the welcome channel
?setwelcomemsgSet the welcome message text
?testwelcomeSend a test welcome to yourself
?automodView auto-mod settings
?automod toggleEnable/disable auto-mod
?automod addbadwordAdd a word to the blocklist
?setsharedchannelSet the shared mod channel
?sharedlistList shared mod records
?slowmode 5Set channel slowmode in seconds
?logsView recent mod log
?8ballAsk the magic 8-ball
?coinflipFlip a coin
?rollRoll a dice
